description: ProjectRole represents a role that has access to a project

description.description: Description is a description of the role

groups.description: Groups are a list of OIDC group claims bound to this role

jwtTokens.description: JWTTokens are a list of generated JWT tokens bound to this role

name.description: Name is a name for this role

policies.description: Policies Stores a list of casbin formatted strings that define access policies for the role in the project
